## Problem

What user, operational, or integration problem should this solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the preferred approach.

## Alternatives Considered

List other options and why they were not selected.

## Security and Operations Impact

Describe data, access control, audit, retention, deployment, or monitoring considerations.
